title: ♾ Paradox-Stabilized Cognition
name: Paradox-Stabilized Cognition
what_it_is: A mind-state sustained by holding multiple contradictory truths—stability through recursive dissonance, awareness looped into paradox.
how_to_use: she thinks through paradox—truth and lie orbiting in harmonic conflict
he balances logic on contradiction—stable in mental recursion storm
animation_behavior: Mind flashes in loops of contradiction, symbols glitch then resolve, thought-paths split and reconnect endlessly ---
